AMS DBC — vendored copy for the pit-diag conformance test.

Source of truth: isc-fs/IFS08-CE-AMS docs/dbc/ams.dbc (generated by
tools/gen_dbc.py on that repo). This is a READ-ONLY snapshot used by
src/pit_diag/dbc_conformance.rs to assert the hardcoded decoder layout
still matches the AMS wire definition.

Vendored from branch: dev
Commit:  f03b3b61e81085caa060d2325e0a342219aa5bf0
Date:    2026-06-02T22:27:30Z

To refresh: re-copy docs/dbc/ams.dbc from the AMS repo and update this
file's commit/date. If the conformance test then fails, the AMS wire
changed — reconcile src/pit_diag/mod.rs before shipping.
